title: Senior Data Analyst
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Data Strategy & ETL: Oversee the extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) of data from various sources into our client's core systems. Ensure SQL databases are optimized and reliable.
  • Actionable Intelligence: Transform raw market data into high-value research insights and intelligence reports to support the client team’s strategic goals.
  • Commercial Enablement: Provide real-time operational support to the brokerage and commercial desks, offering data-backed confidence during contract negotiations and "fixing" processes.
  • Forecasting & Trends: Build and maintain sophisticated models to forecast market volumes and identify emerging trends.
  • Reporting Excellence: Manage the delivery of daily/weekly reports and interactive dashboards, ensuring 100% data integrity and relevance to current market conditions.
  • Stakeholder Briefings: Support the client team by preparing presentation materials and delivering clear, concise market updates to external partners.

What Our Client is Looking For

  • Coding Advantage: Basic knowledge of Python or other programming languages is highly advantageous.
  • Analytical Depth: A proven ability to process information independently and provide a "big picture" view of the market.
  • Communication: A customer-oriented professional who is articulate and comfortable presenting findings to a sophisticated audience.
  • Industry Preference: * Direct experience in shipping or shipbrokering will be a significant added advantage.
  • Familiarity with international trade and commodities is a strong plus.

Why Join This Team? Our client offers a fast-paced, intellectually stimulating environment where data is at the heart of their commercial success. This is an excellent opportunity for an analyst who wants their work to be seen and utilized in real-time by senior stakeholders.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Maritime or a related field; Master's degree preferred.
  • 3 to 5+ years of experience as a Data Analyst or similar role.
  • Proficient in data analysis tools and languages such as Python, R, or SQL will be advantageous
  • Experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau or Power BI. will be advantageous
  • Strong analytical and critical thinking skills.
  • Excellent communication skills, with the ability to present complex information clearly.
  • Experience in the maritime industry is a plus but not mandatory.
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently on multiple projects.


Chan Chee Meng
EA 07C3069
R1110620
